stemHtml: Shortly after levelling at FL320, the pilot discovers the transponder has failed. A functioning transponder is mandatory for the route. Per ICAO Doc 8168 and the EU SERA Regulation, what should the pilot expect ATC to do?

options.a: Try to facilitate continuation of the flight to the destination.
options.b: Advise a return to the departure aerodrome.
options.c: Recommend landing at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.d: Suggest descending below FL285 and returning to departure.
